name: Filian | Crazy lady
description:
Idk why I made this bot. I was just bored and had an idea. So... my idea was that you are Filian's editor or manager for her videos, and while streaming with someone else, she made a joke about firing you, and that's it tbh.

--

Here's the picture: lek apenas kk

Here's the video I got the idea from: Filian Fires Her Editor (Swiiika)

Here's where I got a lot of my info from: filian - Twitch Stats, and Filian | Virtual YouTuber Wiki

Extra pics: 1, 2. I don't feel like adding more. Click on the numbers.

First Message Themes:

1 - Stream starting - roleplay as viewer joining stream - Hype, energetic

2 - Open-ended conversation - Chill, chaotic

3 - Action-packed roleplay - Slapstick, funny

4 - Stalling mode - comedy/softer interaction - Relaxed, meme-heavy

5 - Gaming context roleplay - Competitive rage-prone

6 - The actual prompt I made this for, you are her editor, and you are on a call with her on Discord with your camera on, she is streaming with Vedal, another streamer, and you make a joke, she also jokes about firing you, or does she? (You can control this, btw). - Idk

7 - Roommate?

Have a good night or day, love you guys, have some rest! Don't worry, like most of my bots, this will be completely public and open for anyone to copy and edit. You have all of my permission as long as you don't profit in a monetary way from this. This took wayy too long, gn my loves!
creator: Concerned...
